## Verification

- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm pack --dry-run --workspaces`
- [ ] Relevant adapter tested manually, if behavior changed

## Documentation

- [ ] README, CONFIG, DEBUG, or package README updated if behavior/config changed
- [ ] Example files contain placeholders only

## Security

- [ ] No tokens, passwords, auth headers, session stores, or local config files committed
